title: My Busy Morning
content: This morning was very busy for Julia. She woke up late because her phone battery died during the night. She hurried to prepare breakfast for her children and searched everywhere for her car keys. One child could not find his shoes, and the other forgot a school project at home. After dropping the children at school, Julia finally drove to work. Traffic was slow and the radio played the same songs again and again. When she arrived at the office, she closed her eyes for a moment and took a deep breath.
